case_title: KERRY ANNE DURKAN ET AL VS. STERLING SAM

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-25-2017 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT DURKAN, KERRY ANNE DURKAN, JAMES RECOVER FROM APPELLANT SAM, STERLING $615.00 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $685.00 PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED
MINI MINUTES FOR MAR-01-2017 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 525
RECORD REMANDED TO SMALL CLAIMS (EXHIBITS TRANSFER TO SMALL CLAIMS DEPARTMENT)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,180.10 FILED BY DURKAN, KERRY ANNE DURKAN, JAMES AS TO DEFENDANT SAM, STERLING ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-25-2017 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF DURKAN, KERRY ANNE DURKAN, JAMES

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-25-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-25-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFFS KERRY ANNE DURKAN AND JAMES DURKAN ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT STERLING SAM IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD MITCHELL; CLERK; J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT SAM, STERLING MAILED TO PLAINTIFF DURKAN, KERRY ANNE DURKAN, JAMES
TRANSMITTAL RECEIPT FILED (NO EXHIBITS TRANSFER FROM SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)
STIPULATION AND ORDER TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FILED BY APPELLANT SAM, STERLING AS TO RESPONDENT DURKAN, KERRY ANNE

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Mar-01-2017 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 11:43 AM: BOTH SIDES APPEAR THIS MORNING FOR TRIAL DE NOVO: APPELLANT MR. STERLING SAM APPEARS IN PROPRIA PERSONA; RESPONDENT KERRY ANNE DURKAN, ET AL ALSO APPEARING IN PROPRIA PERSONA.

THE COURT ENTERTAINS STATEMENTS PRESENTED AND READS AND REVIEWS DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE PRESENTED TO THE COURT BY BOTH SIDES.

AFTER HEARING ALL TESTIMONY PRESENTED BY THE PARTIES AND AFTER RECEIVING AND REVIEWING ALL SUBMITTED DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE, THE COURT THEREUPON TAKES THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION.

JUDGE PRO TEM JASON JUNGREIS; CLERK MARJORIE L. MANZELLA; NOT REPORTED (DEPT. 525).

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jan-25-2017 Judgment Entered
